extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR at 21 years old overturned a 57-second deficit to ROGLIC on the final mountain time trial, winning by 1:56 and taking yellow, polka dots, and white jerseys.
tactical_patterns: POGACAR reversed 33-second deficit between checkpoints 2-3, gaining 40+ seconds in final climb section alone.
JUMBO-VISMA's 11-day yellow defense collapsed because team strength meant nothing in solo ITT discipline.
VALPANER's progressive pacing (6 seconds ahead at CP3 after trailing 33 at CP2) reveals effective climbing ITT strategy.
ROGLIC's 5th place finish inadequate despite being competitive at early time checks, suggesting premature energy expenditure.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Won while also taking KOM points on climb, indicating he had surplus energy beyond what was needed for GC reversal.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost 1:56 to teammate's former protégé despite being within seconds at checkpoint 1, suggesting mental collapse not physical.
rider_signals.PORT Richie: neutral: Climbed overall standings as Lopez/Landa faltered, confirming podium photo goal mentioned pre-stage as realistic target.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Lost polka dots despite not needing stage effort, showing POGACAR's mountain ITT superiority exceeded all defensive calculations.
